noncurrent_field_audit.note: P9LNLS = 90+-days-past-due-and-still-accruing only (normal to be zero); NCLNLS = total noncurrent (nonaccrual + 90+). FinLens originally used P9LNLS; fixed to NCLNLS in features.py.

noncurrent_reconstruction.note: pre-2014 RC-N has no total line; the label-based category sum is validated against the 2014+ official total (1403+1407) where both exist - rank-correct but magnitude-light, hence the 2014 boundary level shift.
